title: oberna schottiana
intro: Oberna schottiana, also known as African Sage, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Oberna schottiana include reducing fever, relieving coughs, and soothing sore throats, making it a valuable remedy for various respiratory ailments. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are typically used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
